array_types.name: CC_Registers
array_types.code: type CC_Registers is array (0 .. 3) of CC_Register;

array_types.name: EVENTS_COMPARE_Registers
array_types.code: type EVENTS_COMPARE_Registers is array (0 .. 3) of HAL.UInt32;

array_types.name: EVTEN_COMPARE_Field_Array

type EVTEN_COMPARE_Field_Array is array (0 .. 3) of EVTEN_COMPARE0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 4;

EVTENSET_COMPARE_Field_Array

record_types.name: CC_Register
COUNTER_Register
EVTEN_COMPARE_Field
EVTEN_Register
EVTENCLR_COMPARE_Field
EVTENCLR_Register

fields.name: TICK
fields.description: Disable routing to PPI of OVRFLW event.

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: Disable routing to PPI of COMPARE[0] event.

record_types.name: EVTENSET_COMPARE_Field
EVTENSET_Register

fields.name: TICK
fields.description: Enable routing to PPI of OVRFLW event.

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: Enable routing to PPI of COMPARE[0] event.

record_types.name: INTENCLR_COMPARE_Field
INTENCLR_Register
INTENSET_COMPARE_Field
INTENSET_Register
POWER_Register
PRESCALER_Register
RTC_Peripheral

fields.name: INTENCLR
fields.description: Configures event enable routing to PPI for each RTC event.

fields.name: EVTEN
fields.description:
Enable events routing to PPI. The reading of this register gives the
value of EVTEN.

fields.name: EVTENSET
fields.description:
Disable events routing to PPI. The reading of this register gives the
value of EVTEN.

fields.name: COUNTER
fields.description:
12-bit prescaler for COUNTER frequency (32768/(PRESCALER+1)). Must be
written when RTC is STOPed.

variables.name: RTC0_Periph
variables.code:
RTC0_Periph : aliased RTC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => RTC0_Base;

variables.name: RTC1_Periph
variables.code:
RTC1_Periph : aliased RTC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => RTC1_Base;
